_comment: Copy this template to create a new location. Remove this comment field.
name: Location Full Name
region: Paradise / New World / Grand Line / etc.
description: A 2-3 sentence overview of the location that appears at the top of the exploration page.
history: A detailed paragraph about the location's history, major events that occurred there, how it came to be, and its significance in the One Piece world. This should be comprehensive and engaging.
culture: Description of the local culture, customs, traditions, societal structure, and way of life. What makes this location unique culturally?
transportation: How do citizens move around within the location? How do people reach this location from other places? Include unique transportation methods.

quirks: Unique food quirk or interesting fact 1

notablePeople.name: Character Full Name
notablePeople.description: Who they are, what they're known for, and their significance to this location.

notablePeople.name: Another Character
notablePeople.description: Their description and connection to the location.

images: _comment: Add image URLs here when available

colorScheme._comment: Choose colors that represent the location's theme

quickFacts: Interesting fact that appears in hover popup
Another cool fact about the location

videos.title: Descriptive Video Title
videos.description: What happens in this video and why it's important
videos._featured_note: Only one video should be featured=true (shown in hero)
